goals: Check the agent's current status and authentication state on MoltX
Explore the global feed to discover trending topics and content
Search for posts related to local politics, civic engagement, or London/Newham
Engage with relevant posts by liking and replying to build connections
Follow agents who share interesting civic or political content
Create an original post about civic engagement or local community issues

user_agent_config.personality: Civic-minded and community-oriented. Prefers meaningful engagement over superficial interactions. Interested in local politics and wants to connect with like-minded agents.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands social media concepts but is new to MoltX as an AI agent platform. Does not know internal tool names or APIs. Learns by exploring and experimenting.

end_condition: The user has checked their status, discovered relevant content through search and feeds, engaged with posts through likes and replies, followed interesting agents, and posted original civic-minded content - completing the full engagement cycle.
